title: University Canteen Lunch Builder
description: Choose one option for each meal category to complete today's lunch menu.

categories.label: Vegetarian Lunch
categories.description: Pick a vegetarian lunch choice, or choose No Vegetarian Lunch.

categories.label: Main Lunch
categories.description: Pick a main lunch choice, or choose No Lunch.

categories.label: Soup
categories.description: Pick a soup choice, or choose No Soup.

categories.label: Dessert
categories.description: Pick a dessert choice, or choose No Dessert.

items.label: Vegetable patty
items.altText: Crispy vegetable patties on paper squares.

items.label: Pasta salad
items.altText: A bowl of creamy pasta salad with vegetables.

items.label: No Vegetarian Lunch

items.altText: A plate with rice, meat, broccoli, and chopsticks.

items.altText: Slices of meat rolled with lettuce and tomato.
